meta.title: Expert Dietitian & Psychologist Gözde Akın | Memorial Istanbul
meta.description: Functional medicine specialist in pregnancy nutrition, PCOS, diabetes and insulin resistance. Sustainable nutrition counseling at Memorial Göztepe and Ataşehir Hospitals, Istanbul.

hero.subtitle: A holistic nutrition and psychology approach focused on metabolic improvement, insulin resistance balance, and blood biochemistry optimization.

about.title: Expert Dietitian & Psychologist
about.intro: As a healthcare professional, I combine nutrition and psychology with a holistic approach to support both physical and mental well-being.
about.bio1: I graduated 2nd in Nutrition and Dietetics and 3rd in the Faculty of Health Sciences at Okan University. I completed a double major in Psychology and earned my master's degree to become a Specialist Dietitian.
about.bio2: From 2017 to 2023, I served as lead dietitian at Memorial Ataşehir Hospital. I gained international experience in Canada. I currently see patients at Memorial Göztepe Hospital.
about.bio3: I focus not only on weight management but also on behavior change and sustainable lifestyle habits for my clients.
about.missionText: To provide science-based, sustainable health solutions centered on helping people.
about.visionText: To build Turkey's most trusted functional medicine nutrition platform by combining nutrition and psychology.
educationItems: Okan University — Faculty of Health Sciences (3rd)
Okan University — MSc in Nutrition & Dietetics

faq.title: Your Questions Answered
faq.q1: What happens in the first consultation?
faq.a1: A detailed assessment, nutrition habits analysis, goal setting, and blood test referral if needed.
faq.a2: Yes, consultation services are available via online video calls from Turkey and abroad.
faq.q3: Should I only consult for weight loss?
faq.a3: No. Services are also provided for PCOS, diabetes, insulin resistance, pregnancy nutrition, and functional medicine.
faq.a4: Yes. Psychological support for emotional eating, motivation loss, and behavior change is part of the holistic approach.
faq.q5: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a5: You can book via WhatsApp, phone, or the website.

consent.title: Cookie & Privacy Preferences
consent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and deliver the site securely. Manage your preferences below. See our
consent.necessaryDesc: Required for site operation, security, and saving your preferences.
consent.preferencesDesc: Used for PWA, language preferences, and embedded videos.
consent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand visitor statistics anonymously.
consent.marketingDesc: Used for personalized content and campaign measurement.

sections.title: Data Controller
paragraphs: This website is operated by Expert Dietitian & Psychologist Gözde Akın. Contact: dytgozdeakin@gmail.com, +90 (0) 538 935 92 14.
Personal data is processed in accordance with Turkish Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (KVKK).

sections.title: Data We Collect
paragraphs: Via the contact form: name, email, phone, and message content. Via technical logs: IP address, browser information, and cookie data may be processed.
Health-related information shared during consultation is processed only to the extent necessary to provide services.

sections.title: Purposes of Processing
paragraphs: Responding to appointment requests, providing consultation services, website security and improvement, and fulfilling legal obligations.
With your explicit consent, informational and communication activities may be carried out.

sections.title: Legal Basis
paragraphs: Under KVKK Art. 5/2: contract performance, legal obligation, legitimate interest. Where explicit consent is required, KVKK Art. 5/1 applies.

sections.title: Retention Period
paragraphs: Personal data is retained for the period required by the processing purpose and applicable statute of limitations, then deleted, destroyed, or anonymized.

sections.title: Your Rights
paragraphs: Under KVKK Art. 11, you have the right to learn whether your data is processed, request information, correction, deletion, objection, and compensation for damages.
You may submit requests to dytgozdeakin@gmail.com.

sections.title: What Are Cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They may be used for functionality, security, and remembering preferences.

sections.title: Types of Cookies We Use
paragraphs: Essential cookies: Required for session security, cookie preference storage, and basic site functions.
Functional cookies: Used for PWA installation, language preferences, and embedded YouTube videos.
Analytics cookies: May be used to measure site traffic anonymously (only with your consent).
Marketing cookies: May be used for personalized content and campaign measurement (only with your consent).

sections.title: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Embedded YouTube videos are provided by Google/YouTube and subject to their cookie policies.
Cloudflare infrastructure may use technical cookies for security and performance.
WhatsApp, Instagram, and LinkedIn links are subject to the respective platforms' privacy policies.

sections.title: Managing Your Preferences
paragraphs: You can set your preferences via the cookie banner shown on your first visit.
You may delete or block cookies in your browser settings; some site features may not work as a result.
To change your preferences, clear browser cookies and revisit the site.
